zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Calthorpe於1391年出生在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普時，她的父親William Calthorpe24歲，母親Alianore Mautby31歲。她於大約1410年與John Argentine在英國諾福爾可索普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年在英國享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Calthorpe was born in 1391, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, her father, William Calthorpe, was 24 and her mother, Alianore Mautby, was 31. She married John Argentine about 1410, in Thorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1427, in England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Calthorpe est née en 1391, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Calthorpe, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alianore Mautby, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Argentine environ 1410, à Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1427, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Calthorpe(이)가 1391년 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Calthorpe(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alianore Mautby(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1410년 영국 노르폴크 소에서 John Argentine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 영국에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Calthorpe родилась в 1391 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Calthorpe было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alianore Mautby, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Argentine около 1410 г. в местности таурп, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1427 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 36 лет.
